final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin live stream featuring a female streamer (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a live-streaming UI aesthetic with real-time comments overlay — exact interface styling is yours
Composition: must be vertical 9:16 framing typical of mobile live-stream platforms
Subject: must include a female streamer (神仙姐姐 persona) holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must include typical live-stream room setting with comment bubbles and viewer count overlay
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging live-stream atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign the streamer is holding
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the sign text exactly as written; must include typical Douyin live-stream UI elements (comment area, viewer count, gift buttons)
Avoid:
